use_case: Daily traffic breakdown by country. Used for geographic audience analysis
granularity: One row per unique combination of (date, country)

fields.name: date
fields.description: Date of the sessions

fields.name: country
fields.description: User's country (GA4 country dimension)

fields.name: active_users
fields.description: Number of distinct active users

fields.name: new_users
fields.description: Number of first-time users

fields.name: bounce_rate
fields.description: Bounce rate

fields.name: engagement_rate
fields.description: Engagement rate

fields.name: average_session_duration
fields.description: Average session duration in seconds

fields.name: sessions
fields.description: Total number of sessions

fields.name: capsuite_ref
fields.description: Client identifier slug used to partition blobs in Azure Blob Storage

fields.name: property_id
fields.description: Google Analytics 4 property ID

fields.name: property_name
fields.description: Google Analytics 4 property display name

use_case: Catalog of all GA4 events fired on a given day. Used to verify event coverage and identify which events are marked as key conversion events
granularity: One row per unique combination of (date, event_name, is_key_event)

fields.name: date
fields.description: Date the event was observed

fields.name: event_name
fields.description: GA4 event name (e.g. page_view, scroll, purchase, session_start)

fields.name: is_key_event
fields.description: 'true' if this event is marked as a key event (conversion) in GA4, otherwise 'false'

fields.name: capsuite_ref
fields.description: Client identifier slug used to partition blobs in Azure Blob Storage

fields.name: property_id
fields.description: Google Analytics 4 property ID

fields.name: property_name
fields.description: Google Analytics 4 property display name

use_case: Organic search keyword rankings and click performance from Google Search Console. Used for SEO analysis
granularity: One row per search query keyword per day

fields.name: query
fields.description: The search query keyword typed by the user

fields.name: date
fields.description: Date of the search impressions and clicks

fields.name: clicks
fields.description: Number of clicks from search results

fields.name: impressions
fields.description: Number of times the URL appeared in search results

fields.name: ctr
fields.description: Click-through rate (clicks / impressions)

fields.name: position
fields.description: Average ranking position in search results (lower is better)

fields.name: rank_by_impressions
fields.description: Rank of this keyword by impression volume on this date (1 = highest impressions)

fields.name: rank_by_clicks
fields.description: Rank of this keyword by click volume on this date (1 = highest clicks)

fields.name: capsuite_ref
fields.description: Client identifier slug used to partition blobs in Azure Blob Storage

use_case: Canonical member profile table used for audience segmentation, identity resolution, consent analysis, and downstream mapping joins.
granularity: One row per primary_email after consolidation of prelanding mem files; latest profile fields with first-join identity anchors retained.

fields.name: primary_email
fields.description: Primary email from LinkedU submission (lead_email); used as the consolidation key when deduplicating member profiles across files.

fields.name: member_id
fields.description: Canonical membership identifier generated as linkedu_mem_{lead_id}.

fields.name: member_no
fields.description: Raw LinkedU lead ID persisted as string.

fields.name: member_join_date
fields.description: Member join timestamp parsed from submission create_date and normalized to Asia/Hong_Kong timezone in ETL preprocessing.

fields.name: member_last_update
fields.description: Latest update timestamp carried in the consolidated profile record for the member.

fields.name: member_reg_location
fields.description: Registration location field reserved in schema; currently not populated by LinkedU ingestion.

fields.name: member_reg_channel
fields.description: Registration acquisition channel from source field how_did_they_hear_about_us.

fields.name: member_type
fields.description: Member type classification field reserved in schema; currently not populated by LinkedU ingestion.

fields.name: is_company
fields.description: Boolean-style company-account indicator; pipeline currently sets this to false for LinkedU records.

fields.name: has_email
fields.description: Boolean-style email availability indicator; pipeline currently sets this to true for LinkedU submissions.

fields.name: secondary_email
fields.description: Secondary email field reserved in schema; currently not populated by LinkedU ingestion.

fields.name: has_phone
fields.description: Boolean-style phone availability indicator; schema field is present but currently set as false in pipeline output.

fields.name: primary_phone
fields.description: Primary phone normalized from phone_sanitized (plus signs removed) when present.

fields.name: secondary_phone
fields.description: Secondary phone field reserved in schema; currently not populated by LinkedU ingestion.

fields.name: gender
fields.description: Gender field reserved in schema; currently not populated by LinkedU ingestion.

fields.name: nationality
fields.description: Nationality field reserved in schema; currently not populated by LinkedU ingestion.

fields.name: age
fields.description: Age field reserved in schema; currently not populated by LinkedU ingestion.

fields.name: age_group
fields.description: Age group field reserved in schema; currently not populated by LinkedU ingestion.

fields.name: birthday_year
fields.description: Birth year field reserved in schema; currently not populated by LinkedU ingestion.

fields.name: birthday_month
fields.description: Birth month field reserved in schema; currently not populated by LinkedU ingestion.

fields.name: birthday_day
fields.description: Birth day field reserved in schema; currently not populated by LinkedU ingestion.

fields.name: marital_status
fields.description: Marital status field reserved in schema; currently not populated by LinkedU ingestion.

fields.name: education_level
fields.description: Education/year-group value mapped from source field student_current_year_group.

fields.name: income_level
fields.description: Income level field reserved in schema; currently not populated by LinkedU ingestion.

fields.name: employment_status
fields.description: Employment status field reserved in schema; currently not populated by LinkedU ingestion.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Honorific/title field reserved in schema; currently not populated by LinkedU ingestion.

fields.name: eng_first_name
fields.description: English first name from lead_first_name after right-trim cleanup.

fields.name: eng_last_name
fields.description: English last name from lead_last_name when provided.

fields.name: eng_full_name
fields.description: Display-ready full English name built from first and last name when last name exists.

fields.name: chi_first_name
fields.description: Chinese first name field reserved in schema; currently not populated by LinkedU ingestion.

fields.name: chi_last_name
fields.description: Chinese last name field reserved in schema; currently not populated by LinkedU ingestion.

fields.name: chi_full_name
fields.description: Chinese full name field reserved in schema; currently not populated by LinkedU ingestion.

fields.name: display_name
fields.description: Preferred display name; pipeline currently mirrors eng_full_name.

fields.name: is_subscriber_only
fields.description: Boolean-style subscriber-only flag; pipeline currently sets this to false for LinkedU records.

fields.name: is_opt_in_email
fields.description: Email consent indicator derived from do_not_spam (true when do_not_spam is false).

fields.name: is_opt_in_call
fields.description: Call consent field reserved in schema; currently not populated by LinkedU ingestion.

fields.name: is_opt_in_dm
fields.description: Direct-message consent field reserved in schema; currently not populated by LinkedU ingestion.

fields.name: is_opt_in_sms
fields.description: SMS consent field reserved in schema; currently not populated by LinkedU ingestion.

fields.name: preferred_channel
fields.description: Preferred contact channel; pipeline sets default value to email.

fields.name: preferred_language
fields.description: Preferred language locale; pipeline sets default value to en_US.

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Flexible tagging field reserved in schema; currently not populated by LinkedU ingestion.

fields.name: capsuite_ref
fields.description: Client reference namespace (linkedu) used for tenant-level partitioning.

use_case: Bridges known members to anonymous web tracking IDs for stitching behavioral events to member profiles.
granularity: One row per unique (capsuite_ref, membership_id, sid) mapping between member identity and anonymous tracking SID/APID.

fields.name: capsuite_ref
fields.description: Client reference namespace (linkedu) used for tenant-level partitioning.

fields.name: membership_id
fields.description: Resolved membership ID looked up from memberships collection using lead_email.

fields.name: sid
fields.description: Anonymous SID sourced from tracking_id in prelanding tracking parquet files.

fields.name: capsuite_apid
fields.description: Capsuite Anonymous ID; pipeline sets this equal to tracking_id/SID.

fields.name: capsuite_sid
fields.description: Reserved alternate SID field in target schema; currently not populated by pipeline.

use_case: Dictionary of normalized custom attribute values used to assign stable attribute IDs before member-level mapping.
granularity: One row per unique custom attribute name/value pair available for the client.

fields.name: capsuite_ref
fields.description: Client reference namespace (linkedu) used for tenant-level partitioning.

fields.name: attribute_id
fields.description: Deterministic attribute identifier generated from attribute_name::attribute_value during Neon normalization.

fields.name: attribute_name
fields.description: Custom attribute key from LinkedU set (e.g., intended_year_of_entry, intended_month_of_entry, intended_year_group, applicant_current_school).

fields.name: attribute_value
fields.description: Custom attribute value retained from latest record per lead_email in prelanding custom_attributes files.

use_case: Bridge table that links each member to resolved custom attribute IDs for many-to-many profiling and targeting use cases.
granularity: One row per unique (capsuite_ref, membership_id, attribute_id) relationship.

fields.name: capsuite_ref
fields.description: Client reference namespace (linkedu) used for tenant-level partitioning.

fields.name: membership_id
fields.description: Resolved membership ID associated with the member that owns the attribute value.

fields.name: attribute_id
fields.description: Attribute dictionary ID linked to membership_attributes.attribute_id for member-to-attribute bridging.

use_case: Member event timeline table for registered-event submissions, used for engagement and conversion attribution analyses.
granularity: One row per deduplicated member event action by date and event reference.

fields.name: capsuite_ref
fields.description: Client reference namespace (linkedu) used for tenant-level partitioning.

fields.name: membership_id
fields.description: Membership identifier used as top-level key in processed custom_activity JSON output.

fields.name: event_date
fields.description: Event date bucket derived from submission filename_time date key during custom activity transformation.

fields.name: event_ref_id
fields.description: Event reference ID from registered_event_id (stored as refId in process JSON).

fields.name: event_name
fields.description: Human-readable event name from registered_event (stored as name in process JSON).

fields.name: action
fields.description: Event action verb from process JSON; LinkedU pipeline currently emits submit.

use_case: Outbound link click attributes for click-through analysis.
granularity: One row per outbound link click event at minute precision

fields.name: event_name
fields.description: GA4 event name, usually click/outbound click variants.

fields.description: Timestamp of the event at minute precision.

fields.description: Date partition key.

fields.name: page_location
fields.description: Full URL of the page where the outbound click happened.

fields.name: link_url
fields.description: Outbound URL clicked by the user.

fields.name: capsuite_ref
fields.description: Client identifier slug used to partition blobs in Azure Blob Storage

fields.name: property_id
fields.description: Google Analytics 4 property ID

fields.name: property_name
fields.description: Google Analytics 4 property display name

use_case: Daily page-level performance metrics. Used for content performance analysis and identifying high/low engagement pages
granularity: One row per unique combination of (date, page_path)

fields.name: date
fields.description: Date of the page activity

fields.name: page_path
fields.description: Page path (unified screen/page path from GA4, excludes hostname)

fields.name: active_users
fields.description: Number of distinct active users on this page

fields.name: new_users
fields.description: Number of first-time users who visited this page

fields.name: engagement_rate
fields.description: Fraction of sessions that were engaged

fields.name: page_views
fields.description: Total page view count

fields.name: sessions
fields.description: Total sessions that included this page

fields.name: engaged_sessions
fields.description: Sessions that were classified as engaged

fields.name: bounced_sessions
fields.description: Derived: sessions minus engaged_sessions

fields.name: capsuite_ref
fields.description: Client identifier slug used to partition blobs in Azure Blob Storage

fields.name: property_id

fields.name: property_name
fields.description: Google Analytics 4 property display name

granularity: One row per unique combination of (date, page_path, source, medium)

fields.name: session_source

use_case: Tracks user navigation paths through the website including click events, referrers, and campaign context
granularity: One row per event occurrence at minute precision

fields.name: event_name
fields.description: GA4 event name (e.g. page_view, click)

fields.name: date_hour_minute
fields.description: Timestamp of the event at minute precision, naive (no timezone), in GA4 property timezone

fields.name: date
fields.description: Date portion of date_hour_minute, used as partition key

fields.name: page_referrer
fields.description: Full URL of the referring page; empty string if direct traffic

fields.name: page_location
fields.description: Full URL of the page where the event occurred

fields.name: link_url
fields.description: URL of the link that was clicked; empty string if not a click event

fields.name: session_source_medium
fields.description: Combined source/medium (e.g. google / cpc); '(direct) / (none)' for direct traffic

fields.name: session_campaign_name
fields.description: UTM campaign name; '(not set)' if not tagged

fields.name: capsuite_sid
fields.description: Capsuite session ID (custom GA4 dimension); empty string if not collected

fields.name: capsuite_uid
fields.description: Capsuite user ID (custom GA4 dimension); empty string if not collected

fields.name: capsuite_apid
fields.description: Capsuite application/product ID (custom GA4 dimension); empty string if not collected

fields.name: capsuite_identifier
fields.description: Capsuite identifier (custom GA4 dimension); empty string if not collected

fields.name: capsuite_ref
fields.description: Client identifier slug used to partition blobs in Azure Blob Storage

fields.name: property_id
fields.description: Google Analytics 4 property ID

fields.name: property_name
fields.description: Google Analytics 4 property display name

use_case: Stores the connection state and credentials config for each external data source integrated with the CDP. One row per integration type. Used to check whether a source is connected, when it was last synced, and whether errors occurred.
granularity: One row per integration_type (googleAnalytics, googleSearchConsole, shopify, shopifyCustomApp, wordpress)

fields.name: id
fields.description: Primary key, auto-generated UUID

fields.name: created_date
fields.description: Timestamp when this integration record was first created

fields.name: updated_date
fields.description: Timestamp of the last update to this record, auto-maintained by trigger

fields.name: integration_type
fields.description: Identifier for the integration. One of: googleAnalytics, googleSearchConsole, shopify, shopifyCustomApp, wordpress

fields.name: config
fields.description: Credential and configuration payload specific to the integration type. For googleAnalytics: {propertyId, propertyName}. For googleSearchConsole: {siteUrl}. For shopify: {storeName, accessToken}. For shopifyCustomApp: {storeName, scriptTagId, accessToken}.

fields.name: is_connected
fields.description: True when the integration has been successfully verified as connected

fields.name: last_connected_date
fields.description: Timestamp of the most recent successful connection test

fields.name: is_connection_error
fields.description: True when the last connection attempt failed

fields.name: connection_error
fields.description: Error message from the last failed connection attempt, null if no error

fields.name: is_synced
fields.description: True when a data sync has completed successfully at least once

fields.name: last_synced_date
fields.description: Timestamp of the most recent successful data sync

fields.name: is_sync_error
fields.description: True when the last sync attempt failed

fields.name: sync_error
fields.description: Error message from the last failed sync, null if no error

use_case: Single-row configuration table that controls which CDP and GA report pipelines are active and in debug mode. Also stores the GA property URL (url_domain) used to tie web content scraping to the correct domain. Updated automatically when Google Analytics is connected or disconnected.
granularity: Single configuration row per tenant (single-tenant deployment)

fields.name: id
fields.description: Primary key, auto-generated UUID

fields.name: created_date
fields.description: Timestamp when this config record was created

fields.name: updated_date
fields.description: Timestamp of the last update, auto-maintained by trigger

fields.name: capsuite_ref
fields.description: Client reference slug used to namespace data across pipeline jobs

fields.name: is_trial
fields.description: True when the client is on a trial plan; may affect data retention and pipeline limits

fields.name: url_domain
fields.description: The GA4 property URL (propertyName) set when Google Analytics is connected. Used as the domain identifier for web content and report configuration. Cleared when GA is disconnected.

fields.name: supporting_capsuite_param
fields.description: List of Capsuite tracking parameter names injected into the site. Defaults to [capsuite_sid, capsuite_apid].

fields.name: cdp_reports
fields.description: Per-report debug and configuration flags for CDP pipeline reports. Keys: popup_tracking, blast_tracking, utm_summary, activity_log, web_content_attributes, ap_session_log, ap_anonymous_profile, ap_segment_filter, mem_segment_filter, ap_membership_profiles, outbound_links_attributes. Each entry has isDebugging (bool) and debugStartDate (YYYY-MM-DD).

fields.name: ga_reports
fields.description: Per-report debug and configuration flags for GA data pipeline reports. Keys: path_exploration, path_exploration_duration, utm_performance, utm_daily_performance, utm_daily_full_param_performance, utm_ad_performance, country_performance, page_metrics, page_utm_metrics, website_metrics, keyword_performance, event_list. Each entry has isDebugging (bool) and debugStartDate (YYYY-MM-DD).

use_case: Configuration for the web content scraper that crawls the client's website to extract page attributes. url_pattern is derived from the GA property URL and is used by the scraper to identify pages belonging to this client. Updated automatically when Google Analytics is connected or disconnected.
granularity: Single configuration row per tenant (single-tenant deployment)

fields.name: id
fields.description: Primary key, auto-generated UUID

fields.name: created_date
fields.description: Timestamp when this config record was created

fields.name: updated_date
fields.description: Timestamp of the last update, auto-maintained by trigger

fields.name: capsuite_ref
fields.description: Client reference slug used to namespace data across pipeline jobs

fields.name: cut_off_point_after
fields.description: HTML marker string; the scraper discards page content that appears after this string. Null means no upper cutoff.

fields.name: cut_off_point_before
fields.description: HTML marker string; the scraper discards page content that appears before this string. Null means no lower cutoff.

fields.name: update_time_elements
fields.description: Meta tag name used to extract page last-updated timestamps (e.g. og:updated_time)

fields.name: error_strings
fields.description: List of strings that indicate a scraped page is an error page (404, 403, etc.). Pages containing any of these strings are discarded. Defaults include 'Error 404', 'ERROR 403', 'seem to exist', and CJK equivalents.

fields.name: valid_content_min_length
fields.description: Minimum character length for extracted page content to be considered valid. Pages with fewer characters are discarded. Default is 60.

fields.name: url_pattern
fields.description: Subdomain slug extracted from the GA property URL, used to identify pages belonging to this client during scraping. For example, propertyName 'https://www.mrmiles.hk' produces url_pattern 'mrmiles'. Set automatically on GA connect, cleared on GA disconnect.
